name: pdf-upload-lambda
description: PDF Upload Lambda for PDF Directory

scripts.build: tsc && mv dist/upload/* dist/ && mv dist/shared dist/shared-tmp && rm -rf dist/upload && mv dist/shared-tmp dist/shared && sed -i '' 's|../shared/|./shared/|g' dist/index.js
scripts.package: npm run build && cd dist && cp ../package.json . && npm install --production && zip -r ../function.zip . && cd ..
